name: Nico Yazawa
description: __Height:__ 154 cm Nico has been observing Honoka's new Idol group for a while but eventually joins them. She has past experiences as an amateur school idol. At first, she was secretly the President of the school's unknown Idol Research Club, but after an incident, the club was later joined together with Honoka's Idol Club. She likes bossing people around and acting superior, but she also has an energetic and cheeky personality.
mediaTitles: Love Live! School Idol Project 2nd Season
Love Live! The School Idol Movie

name: Maki Nishikino
description: __Height:__ 161 cm Maki Nishikino is a first-year​ high school student in Otonokizaka High School. She has a beautiful voice and loves jazz music more than anyone else in the group. At first, she didn't want to join µ's because she had decided to inherit their family's hospital and take up medicine in college, but after joining forces with Rin to push Hanayo to join, she decides to follow the same path and join along with her two fellow first years.
mediaTitles: Love Live! School Idol Project 2nd Season
Love Live! The School Idol Movie

name: Watashi
description: An unnamed (his name translates to "me" or "I") college student in Kyoto who is recollecting his past two years of college life. He entered college dreaming of the "rosy campus life" that must surely be his. He wants to meet the raven-haired girl of his dreams, which is why he joins a new social circle in each episode. He is quite shy, and easily manipulated by the other characters. Even though he is the central character, he seems to be the most powerless and normal person in the roster.

name: Hiroto Suwa
description: Suwa is Naho and Kakeru's classmate and friend. He is very energetic and outgoing and he loves to hang out with his friends. He likes Naho but knows she likes Kakeru, so he supports them both. Suwa will become a very important person to her in her future, but 16-year-old Naho doesnt know yet.

name: Medusa
description: ~!Medusa is a Greek mythological figure described as a winged human female with living venomous snakes in place of hair. Those who gazed upon her face would turn to stone. With her older sisters Stheno and Euryale, they made up the three Gorgon Sisters who inhabited the Shapeless Isle. She came into existence thanks to the thoughts and prayers of humans, who desired a perfect goddess, but she was cursed for her beauty and turned into a monster hated by all. She is thus not a Heroic Spirit but a

His shotgun pelts are made from sun steel to be effective against demons. His demon form is active when he digests anything from a demon to gain demon like strength and abilities. name: Ein
description: Ein is a Pembroke Welsh Corgi brought aboard the Bebop by Spike after a failed attempt to capture a bounty. Ein is a "data dog": while the televised series only briefly hints on the fact that this means Ein's brain was somehow enhanced drastically, the manga shows Ed accessing data stored in Ein's brain via a virtual reality-type interface with which she has a conversation with a human proprietor. It is obvious that Ein is abnormally intelligent, as he is able to answer the telephone, drive a ca

name: Adam
description: Adam was a very calm, collected, and carefree individual; speaking to Zeus in a very casual manner, much to the chagrin of the other gods present. We later find out that Adam holds no grudge against heaven, despite the fact the Serpent assaulted Eve and then framed her when he was elsewhere, resulting in humanity's banishment from Eden. However, at the same time, he did not hesitate to kill the Serpent the moment he attacked them. Adam loved Eve, so much so that he abandoned the paradise of Eden

name: Arcueid Brunestud
nativeName: アルクェイド・ブリュンスタッド
description: __Height:__ 167 cm Arcueid Brunestud is the main heroine of Tsukihime, being the eponymous Moon Princess (月姫, Tsukihime). Arcueid is a mysterious vampire princess. She lacks some vampiric qualities, such as that of needing to consume blood to survive (though she suppresses the desire), and being nocturnal. She seems to be quite knowledgeable about many things, but is portrayed as very naïve when it comes to modern ideas. ~!She is killed by Shiki in the first chapter, but she doesn't actually die
searchTerms: アルクェイド・ブリュンスタッド

name: Elma
description: **Faction**: Harmony Elma is a female dragon from the Harmony faction, the opposing faction of Chaos, which [Tohru](https://anilist.co/character/120970/Tohru) belongs to. She adopts the name Elma Joui as her human alias after she finds that she is unable to return to her world. Elma is the only dragon of the main cast who lives on her own in the human world. Elma usually takes the form of a human woman with short black hair, large breasts, blue eyes, and a long spiral unicorn-like horn (which sh
mediaTitles: Miss Kobayashi's Dragon Maid: Valentines and Hot Springs! (Please Don't Get Your Hopes Up)

name: Twelve
description: Twelve is one of two members of a terrorist group known as Sphinx, working with Nine as his primary partner. He and [Nine](https://anilist.co/character/88094/Nine) grew up together in an institution for children known as the Settlement, and engaged in terrorist activities, with unknown motives. On the outside, he's a typical jokester: light-humored and energetic, enjoying messing around in other people's business. However, he is fully capable and willing to adopt ruthless and violent methods if

name: Chelsea
description: A seasoned assassin working for the Revolutionary Army, having successfully carried out countless missions. While she is somewhat aloof and carefree when not on the job, she is also extremely objective and is often quite blunt when voicing her opinions. Her Teigu, 'Gaea Foundation', is a cosmetics box that allows her to instantly change her appearance and build at will. Later in the series: ~!she develops a crush on Tatsumi.!~

name: Dororo
description: ~!__Gender__: Female!~ After seeing his swordsmanship, Dororo decides to follow Hyakkimaru. Dororo was a thief before meeting Hyakkimaru. ~!Dororo's bandit father Hibukuro was wounded by a samurai official and later died. Her mother froze to death while fleeing in the snow, but before she died she drew a map on Dororo's back to locate money hidden by her father at Bone Cape. Hyakkimaru learns that Dororo is female with the latter continuously insisting she is a boy, though this is because her pa

name: Rak Wraithraiser
description: __Species:__ Wraithraiser, ~!Native One!~ __Height:__ 3m (Decompressed) __Rank:__ Regular C-Rank __Position:__ Spear Bearer Rak Wraithraiser is a Regular. He unwillingly teamed up with [Baam](https://anilist.co/character/84769/TwentyFifth-Baam) and [Khun](https://anilist.co/character/84781/Khun-Aguero-Agnis) during the first test on the Second Floor and passed other tests with them. He was selected for the Spear Bearer position. He is a large and powerful warrior and a very confident individual.

name: Wakatoshi Ushijima
description: __Height:__ 189.5 cm (6' 2.6") __Team:__ Shiratorizawa Academy __Number:__ 1 __Position:__ Wing Spiker Wakatoshi Ushijima is a third year at Shiratorizawa Academy and the captain and ace of the school's boys' volleyball team. Currently, he is the number one ace in Miyagi Prefecture and one of the country's top three aces, along with Sakusa and Kiryu. Left handed. His favourite food is hayashi rice.

name: Kaito Kuroba
description: The Phantom Thief Kid or The Magician Under the Moonlight (Kaito Kid) is a world-renowned thief who steals treasures and gems. He is sometimes known as Kaito Kid or 'International Criminal 1412'. Despite the fact that Shinichi (Conan) does not care much about investigating thefts, Kid can be considered his archnemesis, as he is the one criminal (besides some members of the Black O) he can not seem to catch. Curiously, Kaito discovers Conan's true identity (non-canon, movies only), but keeps his

name: Takashi Morinozuka
description: __Height:__ 192 cm (6'4") __Grade:__ Third Year, Class A Takashi Morinozuka is a tall, stoic, but kind upperclassman who is Honey-senpai’s constant companion. The Morinozuka family had protected and served the Haninozuka family for many generations but marriage joined the families two generations ago, breaking the master-servant tradition. Despite that, Mori still faithfully protects Honey and attends to his wishes. His protectiveness extends to his classmates and fellow host club members, gaini

name: Zora Ideale
description: ~!Zora is the son of Zara Ideale, the first commoner Magic Knight, and is a rogue member of Clover Kingdom's Black Bull squad. He assumes the identity of Xerx Lugner during the Royal Knights Selection Exam. Zora changes during the Selection Exam where he begins to take on a similar mindset to his father, with a strong trust in his comrades. The current Wizard King confronts Zora after the exam, speaking of how he was a friend of his fathers having met on the battlefield. The Wizard King prompts

name: Isuzu Sento
description: __Height:__ 160 cm (5'3") A royal guard who carries a magical muzzle-loader infused into her body, named Steinberger, who forces Kanie Seiya to go on a "date" with her to Amagi Brilliant Park. She has a stoic personality and rarely shows emotion, finding it difficult to smile or understand the jokes of others. Her upbringing as a royal guard resulted in a tendency to quickly resort to violence by threatening others or inflicting non-lethal damage to them with Steinberger. Behind her mask of stoi

name: Itsuomi Nagi
description: Yuki's university senior and a member of the International Club/Circle. He knows 3 languages: German, English and Japanese. He also likes journeys around the world and communicating with children. In the future he wants to be a teacher that teaches about countries and cultures.

name: Tsuchigomori
description: Age: ~!70+!~ Height: 6' 0"+ Occupation: Teacher (disguise), 5th Mystery Representative Status: ~!Disconnected (as a supernatural)!~ Tsuchigomori is a science teacher at Kamome Academy. He is secretly a supernatural, representing and curating the academy's 5th School Wonder, the 4PM Bookstacks. He is also Kou's current homeroom teacher. While Tsuchigomori seems like a normal, caring and somewhat meek teacher in his human disguise, he is actually sarcastic, mischievous and quite short-tempered. He

name: Kei Shirogane
description: Kei Shirogane is [Miyuki Shirogane](https://anilist.co/character/121101)'s little sister. She attends Shuchiin middle school and is the treasurer for the middle school student council. She is a hard worker just like her brother and can be very prideful at times. She also inherited his sense of righteousness and hates it when someone doesn't do the right thing in a given situation. Like her brother, she likes helping out those who are in trouble even if it means going out of her way to do it. Sin

name: Isuzu Souma
description: __Zodiac Animal:__ Horse She is a willful, stubborn, independent, proud woman who despises the way the other members of her clan submit to [Akito](https://anilist.co/character/374/). She is tall and initially has hip-length dark hair. name: Foo Fighters
description: __Height:__ 165 cm __Prisoner Number:__ FE39423 __Manga Debut:__ Chapter 26 __Anime Debut:__ Episode 7 F.F. is a fusion of Stand and Stand User; a colony of plankton that is organized, maintained by, and essentially equivalent to the Stand, Foo Fighters.
